programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed; SpongeBob puts up a community bulletin board at the Krusty Krab, but anonymous reviews lead to trouble.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob attempts to write an 800-word essay before morning; Patrick tries to impress his parents on Starfish Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face; SpongeBob asks Patrick to watch Gary while he's away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm; when a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs reveals that he and Plankton have not always been bitter enemies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wants to throw a birthday party for Pearl; SpongeBob receives an invitation to take part in a competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to remove a splinter before Mr. Krabs learns about it and sends him home early; SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and keep playing them, much to the annoyance of Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob orders fake arms; Squidward pretends to be a ghost.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces; SpongeBob, Patrick and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward and Bubble Bass are forced to tolerate each other's company on a trip to Shell City; Squidward takes a trip inside the imagination box and must rely on SpongeBob and Patrick's creativity in order to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A new neighbor moves into town and becomes Squidward's best friend; SpongeBob helps Squidward prepare for a date.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, SpongeBob and Patrick must stop his evil vacation; Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared - including SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward, but Squidward doesn't; Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Crew builds a boat for its penny-pinching captain; SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick begins to take over SpongeBob's life and identity; SpongeBob blows a bubble to keep him company.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town; Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes a local sensation after a food critic gives him high ratings; SpongeBob helps Patrick promote a song that he wrote.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone; Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick sneak into the Treedome; Gary follows Patrick around, and SpongeBob becomes jealous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab employees must work around the clock; Mr. Krabs sheds his shell right before the reunion with his old seafaring buddies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick becomes smart after he gets hit on the head; Sandy's experiment causes SpongeBob and Squidward to meld into one body.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman enslaves SpongeBob and Pat onboard his ghost ship; Gary doesn't want to take a bath.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor; the newly reformed Clean Bubble takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free food to win back customers; SpongeBob needs all of his friends to help him remodel his pineapple home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds a sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab; Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he has an allergy to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home; Squidward gets a nose job at the local hospital and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make a bet to see who can hold a funny face the longest; SpongeBob and Patrick spend a day at Glove World before it closes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob sacrifices his perfect day to help his friends; Patrick gives SpongeBob his most-prized possession.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy Cheeks takes a rocket ship into space; Mr. Krabs gives SpongeBob a pair of squeaky boots.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs' house while he's away and takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in; Squidward is forced to room with Patrick.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to learn about Vikings; SpongeBob leaves boating school to go to a book signing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: Sebuah siri dokumentari 13 episod tentang koleksi dan artifak berharga dan sangat penting; yang kini menjadi KHAZANAH NEGERI SARAWAK dan berada dalam simpanan MUZIUM NEGERI SARAWAK.

programme.title: The Food That Binds the Nation Ep11
programme.desc: Sebuah dokumentari kembara gastronomi yang merentas dari Perlis ke Sarawak, memperkenalkan keunikan juadah berbilang budaya yang memupuk perpaduan dalam kepelbagaian selera.

programme.title: Border Towns of Sarawak Ep04
programme.desc: Documentary filmmaker Yusmal Ghazali explores borderlands, immersing in local life, meeting officials, villagers, entrepreneurs. Revealing history, traits, economy, tourism, post-pandemic challenges.

programme.title: Negeri Yang Hilang Di Sarawak Ep03
programme.desc: Datu Dr.Haji Sanib bin Haji Said yang menghabiskan sepanjang hayatnya mengabdi sebagai ilmuwan dan cendekiawan. Biografi beliau menjadi intipati utama dalam mencari negeri Melayu yang hilang di Sarawak.

programme.title: Ride Your Story Ep06
programme.desc: Docu-series to show case a different aspect of Borneo from the back of a bike, ridden by 7 biker chicks. There will be real encounters with bad weather, mechanical breakdowns and difficult terrains.

programme.title: Makan Lokal Ep10
programme.desc: Makan Lokal adalah rancangan di mana hos, Jaslin Puasa, menjelajah dan merasai pelbagai hidangan tempatan Malaysia, sambil meneroka budaya dan tradisi di sebalik setiap makanan.

programme.title: Wedding Stone Ep06
programme.desc: Don and Rachel's wedding is disrupted by a mysterious rock, forcing them to reassess their past, present, and future to make informed decisions for a successful wedding.

programme.title: My Journey With Nature Ep11
programme.desc: Pengembaraan seorang wanita ke kawasan pendalaman yang belum diterokai diceritakan dalam 'My Journey with Nature', yang menampilkan tarikan pelancongan alam semula jadi.

programme.desc: Rihlah - Islam Di Borneo menjejaki sejarah dan perkembangan Islam di Sarawak serta hubungannya dengan Sabah, Kalimantan dan Brunei melalui budaya, migrasi dan komuniti tempatan.

programme.title: Suara Alam Borneo Ep12
programme.desc: Suara Alam Borneo akan mengupasnya hutan hujan tropika berusia jutaan tahun secara terperinci dengan pelbagai spesis flora dan juga fauna menerusi informasi yang mudah difahami.

programme.title: The Last Highlanders of Borneo Ep05

programme.title: Farmerette Ep08
programme.desc: A documentary highlighting the resilience and empowerment of women farmers in Sarawak, showcasing their contributions to agriculture, family, and community growth for a thriving future.

programme.title: Homegrown Ep05

programme.title: Beautiful Mind Ep03

programme.title: Jet Truck
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc: Coral Sea Dreaming enters into the very heart of life - and death - on a coral reef. The film follows a story that spans 500 million years and stars some of the most exotic and wondrous marine creatures on earth. Coral is the planets greatest natural architect, and coral reefs boast the highest biodiversity of any ecosystem. We meet thousands of reef inhabitants, from ancient turtles to feeding sh

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

It turns out that Julian is reunited with Gea (Saskia Chadwick), the person whose bag he once stole, who turns out to be Vino's younger sibling, separated for more than a decade. In order to deliver Vino's last message, Julian disguises himself as Vino and enters the life of Gea and her family

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: HIKMAH
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. The program is rich in moral values, showcasing individuals as they navigate complex life dilemmas until they ultimately uncover the silver lining and wisdom behind every trial they endure

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah
programme.desc: Dania (Shanice Margaretha) sells petai chili sauce on campus. One day, she accidentally meets Kenny (Aliando Syarief), a rich kid. Kenny's father holds an important position on campus. However, Dania is upset by Kenny's actions, which resulted in him bumping into her and scattering his wares. Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Dari Sini Kita Belajar Untuk Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Julian (Arya Vasco) is determined to find the whereabouts of Vino's mother and sibling, his close friend. It turns out that Julian is reunited with Gea (Saskia Chadwick), the person whose bag he once stole, who turns out to be Vino's younger sibling, separated for more than a decade. In order to deliver Vino's last message, Julian disguises himself as Vino and enters the life of Gea and her family

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan
programme.desc: Cahaya's (Larasati Nugroho) life goal is to make her sister happy. One day, Laras meets Adit (Rizki Alatas). They're both in a hurry, and their paper bags get swapped. Rizki's paper bag is for his fiancée, a beautiful ring. Laras's paper bag contains a simple bracelet.

programme.title: Isai Gaananggal Ep20
programme.desc: Back to back melodious songs.

programme.title: Abhinandana (TG) Ep343
programme.desc: Despite growing apart, Rahul & Abhisarika have loved each other since childhood. By a twist of events, Abhisarika changes her looks to evade a forced marriage & later becomes engaged to Rahul.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep57
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.title: Nagamani (TG) Ep158
programme.desc: Tale of love between the shape-shifting naag - naagin and the never-ending greed of the evil witch seeking immortality by acquiring the life-giving jewel possessed by the naagin.

programme.title: Anju Sundarikal (ML) Ep18
programme.desc: Five friends move into a hostel ruled by a short-tempered warden, unaware of its sinister past; when they hide a charming stranger, comic chaos soon turns eerie.

programme.title: Kanyadanam (ML) Ep42
programme.desc: A father lives happily with his five daughters who adore him but he is worried about finding the right match for all of them. As new alliances come, their lives slowly begin to change.

programme.title: Sathya (TG) Ep14
programme.desc: Sathya values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Hridayam (ML) Ep375
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships.

programme.title: Premapooja (ML) Ep286
programme.desc: Aadi secretly loves his classmate, Pooja. Unbeknownst to him, she is in a passionate relationship with Shanu, which ends in tragedy. Aadi ultimately steps in to save Pooja during a desperate moment.

programme.title: Constable Manju (TG) Ep368
programme.desc: Timid, yet street-smart Manju and an unruly Giri couldn't be more different from each other. Despite their differences, they are bound by fate through an unavoidable marriage.

programme.title: Sravana Sandhya (TG) Ep182
programme.desc: Sravani wants to find a suitable partner for her sister Sandhya, who aspires to live a luxurious lifestyle. Meanwhile, love blossoms between Sravani and Akshay.

programme.title: Sri Hari Kalyanam (TG) Ep67
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones; their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Rasukutty
programme.desc: Rasukutty, an uneducated man, lies to his fiancee Rukmani that he is a lawyer. When Rukmani learns the truth she breaks her engagement with him and starts hating him.

programme.title: Isai Gaananggal Ep10
programme.desc: Back to back melodious songs.

programme.title: Swayamvarappanthal (ML) Ep226
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu (TG) Ep368
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife.

programme.title: Abhinandana (TG) Ep368
programme.desc: Despite growing apart, Rahul & Abhisarika have loved each other since childhood. By a twist of events, Abhisarika changes her looks to evade a forced marriage & later becomes engaged to Rahul.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha (TG) Ep370
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Amme Mookambike (ML) Ep118
programme.desc: Karthika faces numerous challenges in her life. As she navigates these hardships, she finds solace and strength in the goddess Mookambika, who eventually intervenes to protect her and her family

programme.title: Sathya (TG) Ep30
programme.desc: Sathya values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu Ranga (TG) Ep190
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering.

programme.title: Nagamani (TG) Ep162
programme.desc: Tale of love between the shape-shifting naag - naagin and the never-ending greed of the evil witch seeking immortality by acquiring the life-giving jewel possessed by the naagin.

programme.title: Anju Sundarikal (ML) Ep23
programme.desc: Five friends move into a hostel ruled by a short-tempered warden, unaware of its sinister past; when they hide a charming stranger, comic chaos soon turns eerie.

programme.title: Maharshi (TG) Ep33
programme.desc: A rich businessman returns to India to mend ways with his ex-classmate. However, when he learns about his friend's plight, he tries to help him and becomes a saviour for the villagers in the process.

programme.title: Sravana Sandhya (TG) Ep182
programme.desc: Sravani wants to find a suitable partner for her sister Sandhya, who aspires to live a luxurious lifestyle. Meanwhile, love blossoms between Sravani and Akshay.

programme.title: Mr. Brahmachari (ML) Ep89
programme.desc: Ananthan Thampi is a middle-aged man who has decided to remain a bachelor and maintain his youthful looks. However, in an unexpected turn of events, he ends up marrying a girl to save her life.

programme.title: Isai Gaananggal Ep07

programme.desc: Detroit Tigers v New York Yankees (Start-time 11.40pm). Coverage of the American League match from Comerica Park, as the two sides play in the third and final game of the series. The last time these sides met was in Spring Training back in March as the Tigers claimed a 3-1 victory.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road
programme.desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Howard Hughes, a germaphobic inventor with mental illness, creates a new plane. Despite personal struggles, he also becomes a successful filmmaker, balancing aviation and Hollywood pursuits.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: When a man with HIV is fired by his law firm because of his condition, he hires a homophobic small-time lawyer as the only willing advocate for a wrongful dismissal suit.

programme.title: Charlie Countryman
programme.desc: Charlie's deceased mum's spirit sends him to Bucharest, where he fulfils a promise to a fellow passenger who dies mid-flight.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Charlie, a 15-year-old introvert, enters high school and is nervous about his new life. When he befriends his seniors, he learns to cope with his friend's suicide and his tumultuous past.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer while a determined U.S. Marshal attempts to nab him.

programme.title: Woman in Gold
programme.desc: Maria Altman, a Jewish refugee, along with her lawyer Randy Schoenberg, faces several difficulties while reclaiming the painting of her aunt, which was seized by the Nazis before World War II.

programme.title: Cut Amirah - EP 2
programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak - EP 8
programme.desc: Tekan Minyak is a story that revolves around 5 women who call themselves "The Havana Girls". Each of them have their own episodes but they are bonded by the thread of friendship which is held by Zuraidah, the oldest of them. They all started their friendship when they were young from a religious class and after a short separation, they all unite back and the incidents that happen will be core of D

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 6
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Cantik Detektif S5 - EP 8
programme.desc: Our Cantik Detektif - Huda Ali - returns with a newfound determination to uncover the world's beauty secrets. programme.title: Kaki Bola S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Millenia United reunites, only to discover that life has changed everyone. With key players struggling to balance family and work commitments, the team finds itself at a crossroads. programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: Gracie Hart, a tomboyish FBI agent, goes undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States beauty pageant when a terrorist threatens to bomb the event.

programme.desc: Elphaba and Glinda, polar opposites, become friends at Shiz University. Later, their relationship faces a crucial test when Elphaba defies The Wizard of Oz, altering both of their destinies.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When grieving architect David moves into a new apartment, he finds the spirit of the last tenant, workaholic doctor Elizabeth, still very much in-residence.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York, only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon can't let Viktor into America, or let him leave.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: When Flint learns that his machine is creating dangerous food-animal hybrids on Swallow Falls, he sets out with his friends to save his home. However, they soon realise that they have been deceived.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: A couple search for each other years after the night they first met, fell in love, and separated, convinced that one day they'd end up together.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Pengabdi Setan
programme.desc: A mother finally passes away after suffering for three years from an unknown disease. With his wife gone, the father leaves the children to go work out of town. programme.desc: Ikuti 3 kisah orang minyak yang diarahkan oleh 3 sutradara.

programme.title: You Die

The downside to it is that it will result in its user's death after twenty-four hours.

With the support of his friend and girlfriend, Dan can either accept the challenge, or fight back.

programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Walid Ep09
